plugin.name: Recall_Manager
plugin.author: Solao
plugin.purpose: Build your own clickable travel/recall buttons for Aardwolf
plugin.description:
Recall Manager -- a miniwindow of clickable buttons you build yourself. Each button runs a list of commands separated by '|' (a pipe, NOT a semicolon -- Aardwolf's command stacking would split a ';' before this plugin sees it). Ships empty; nothing is assumed about your character.
recallmanager add <name> <cmd|cmd|...> add a button recallmanager edit <name> <cmd|cmd|...> change a button's commands recallmanager del <name> remove a button recallmanager at <name> <regexp|off> when that line is seen, set 'At:' to <name> recallmanager <name> fire a button (same as clicking it) recallmanager list show your buttons recallmanager reset zero the counters recallmanager show/hide the window recallmanager help this
Example (a held-item transport + a plain recall): recallmanager add bus get 12345 67890|hold 12345|enter|dual 55555|put 12345 67890 recallmanager at bus ^WHOOOOOOOOOOOOSH!$ recallmanager add recall recall

muclient.script:
require "movewindow" require "serialize"
local win = GetPluginID() local cfg -- { ver, methods[], location, last, font, size }
-- title shown on the miniwindow header: "<display name> v<version>". Version is -- pulled from the plugin metadata (GetPluginInfo code 19) so it never drifts -- from the <plugin version="..."> header. Convention for all our UI plugins. local TITLE = "Recall Manager" local PVER = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) or "?" local function header () return TITLE .. " v" .. PVER end
-- verbs the dispatcher owns; can't be used as button names local RESERVED = { add=true, edit=true, del=true, delete=true, at=true, rename=true, list=true, reset=true, help=true, ["?"]=true, show=true, hide=true, }
local function defaults () return { ver = 1, methods = {}, location = "?", last = "-", font = "Lucida Console", size = 9 } end
local COL = { bg = ColourNameToRGB("#0d1117"), bar = ColourNameToRGB("#161b2e"), btn = ColourNameToRGB("#1b2540"), hover = ColourNameToRGB("#274060"), text = ColourNameToRGB("#e6e6e6"), dim = ColourNameToRGB("#8a93a8"), accent = ColourNameToRGB("#e94560"), ok = ColourNameToRGB("#3ad07a"), border = ColourNameToRGB("#3a4a6b"), }
local PAD = 6 local ROW_H = 20 local MINW = 150 local hovered = nil local L = { width = MINW } -- computed layout: width, title_h, fh, foot_y, rows[name]=y
local function find (name) for i, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do if m.name == name then return m, i end end end
local function repaint () WindowShow(win, true) pcall(CallPlugin, "abc1a0944ae4af7586ce88dc", "BufferedRepaint") -- aard buffered repaint if present end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- runtime arrival triggers (one per method that defines an 'at' pattern) ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function trig_name (name) return "rm_at_" .. name end
local function drop_trigger (name) DeleteTrigger(trig_name(name)) -- returns a code if absent; harmless end
local function make_trigger (m) if not m.at or m.at == "" then return end drop_trigger(m.name) AddTriggerEx(trig_name(m.name), m.at, "", trigger_flag.Enabled + trigger_flag.RegularExpression + trigger_flag.KeepEvaluating, -1, 0, "", "rm_arrived", sendto.script, 100) end
function rm_arrived (tname) -- global: named in AddTriggerEx local m = find((tname:gsub("^rm_at_", ""))) if m then cfg.location = m.name; paint() end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- layout: paint() draws pixels only; rebuild() changes the button SET -- (resize + hotspots). Splitting them keeps a hover repaint from tearing -- down the hotspot you're mid-click on. ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function paint () -- global so rm_arrived (defined above) can call it WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, 0, 0, COL.bg) WindowRectOp(win, 2, 0, 0, L.width, L.title_h, COL.bar) WindowText(win, "fb", TITLE, PAD, PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.accent) WindowText(win, "f", " v"..PVER, PAD + WindowTextWidth(win, "fb", TITLE), PAD/2, 0, 0, COL.dim)
if #cfg.methods == 0 then WindowText(win, "f", "No buttons yet.", PAD, L.title_h + PAD, 0, 0, COL.dim) WindowText(win, "f", "recallmanager add <name> <cmds>", PAD, L.title_h + PAD + L.fh + 2, 0, 0, COL.dim) else for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do local y = L.rows[m.name] local bg = (hovered == "rm_"..m.name) and COL.hover or COL.btn WindowRectOp(win, 2, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, y+ROW_H-3, bg) WindowRectOp(win, 1, PAD, y, L.width-PAD, y+ROW_H-3, COL.border) WindowText(win, "f", m.name.." ("..(m.count or 0)..")", PAD+5, y+3, 0, 0, COL.text) end end
local ly = L.foot_y WindowText(win, "f", "At: ", PAD, ly, 0, 0, COL.dim) WindowText(win, "fb", cfg.location, PAD + WindowTextWidth(win,"f","At: "), ly, 0, 0, COL.ok) WindowText(win, "f", "Last: "..cfg.last, PAD, ly+L.fh+1, 0, 0, COL.dim)
WindowRectOp(win, 1, 0, 0, L.width-1, L.height-1, COL.border) repaint() end
function rebuild () -- global for symmetry; call on config changes L.fh = WindowFontInfo(win, "f", 1) or 12 L.title_h = L.fh + PAD
-- width fits the longest label (and the title + version) local w = WindowTextWidth(win, "fb", TITLE) + WindowTextWidth(win, "f", " v"..PVER) if #cfg.methods == 0 then w = math.max(w, WindowTextWidth(win, "f", "recallmanager add <name> <cmds>")) end for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do w = math.max(w, WindowTextWidth(win, "f", m.name.." (99)")) end L.width = math.max(MINW, w + PAD*2 + 10)
L.rows = {} local y = L.title_h + PAD/2 if #cfg.methods == 0 then y = L.title_h + PAD + (L.fh + 2) + L.fh + PAD/2 -- room for the 2 hint lines else for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do L.rows[m.name] = y; y = y + ROW_H end y = y + PAD/2 end L.foot_y = y L.height = L.foot_y + (L.fh * 2) + PAD
WindowResize(win, L.width, L.height, COL.bg) WindowDeleteAllHotspots(win) -- safe here: rebuild never runs mid-click for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do local ry = L.rows[m.name] WindowAddHotspot(win, "rm_"..m.name, PAD, ry, L.width-PAD, ry+ROW_H-3, "rm_over", "rm_out", "", "", "rm_click", m.name, miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) end movewindow.add_drag_handler(win, 0, 0, L.width, L.title_h) -- re-add after DeleteAll paint() end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- fire a button ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function fire (m) -- commands are '|'-separated, NOT ';': with command stacking on, a typed ';' -- would be split by the client before this plugin ever sees it for c in (m.cmds or ""):gmatch("[^|]+") do Send((c:gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$",""))) end m.count = (m.count or 0) + 1 cfg.last = m.name cfg.location = m.name -- optimistic; an 'at' trigger refines it on arrival paint() end
function rm_click (flags, id) local m = find((id:gsub("^rm_", ""))) if m then fire(m) end end function rm_over (flags, id) if hovered ~= id then hovered = id; paint() end end function rm_out (flags, id) if hovered == id then hovered = nil; paint() end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- command dispatcher ---------------------------------------------------------------------- local function help () ColourNote("cyan","",header().." -- build your own travel buttons") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager add <name> <cmd|cmd|...> add a button (| separates cmds)") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager edit <name> <cmd|cmd|...> change its commands") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager del <name> remove it") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager at <name> <regexp|off> arrival line -> sets 'At:'") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager <name> fire it (same as clicking)") ColourNote("yellow","","recallmanager list | reset | show | hide") end
local function list () if #cfg.methods == 0 then ColourNote("silver","","No buttons yet. recallmanager add <name> <cmds>") return end for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do ColourNote("cyan","",m.name.." ("..(m.count or 0)..")") ColourNote("silver",""," cmds: "..(m.cmds or "")) if m.at and m.at ~= "" then ColourNote("silver",""," at: "..m.at) end end end
local function valid_name (n) return n ~= nil and n:match("^[%w_]+$") ~= nil and not RESERVED[n:lower()] end
function rm_cmd (name, line, wildcards) local arg = (wildcards[1] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if arg == "" then if WindowInfo(win, 5) then WindowShow(win, false) else WindowShow(win, true); repaint() end return end local verb, rest = arg:match("^(%S+)%s*(.*)$") verb = verb:lower()
if verb == "help" or verb == "?" then help() elseif verb == "list" then list() elseif verb == "show" then WindowShow(win, true); repaint() elseif verb == "hide" then WindowShow(win, false) elseif verb == "reset" then for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do m.count = 0 end cfg.last = "-"; paint() ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: counters reset.")
elseif verb == "add" then local n, cmds = rest:match("^(%S+)%s+(.+)$") if not valid_name(n) then ColourNote("orange","","Bad name. Use letters/digits/_ , not a reserved word. Usage: recallmanager add <name> <cmd|cmd>") elseif not cmds then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: recallmanager add <name> <cmd|cmd|...>") elseif find(n) then ColourNote("orange","","'"..n.."' exists. Use recallmanager edit "..n.." ...") else table.insert(cfg.methods, { name = n, cmds = cmds, count = 0 }) rebuild() ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: added "..n.." = "..cmds) end
elseif verb == "edit" then local n, cmds = rest:match("^(%S+)%s+(.+)$") local m = n and find(n) if not m or not cmds then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: recallmanager edit <name> <cmd|cmd|...>") else m.cmds = cmds ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: "..n.." = "..cmds) end
elseif verb == "del" or verb == "delete" then local n = rest:match("^(%S+)") local m, i if n then m, i = find(n) end if not m then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: recallmanager del <name>") else drop_trigger(n) table.remove(cfg.methods, i) rebuild() ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: removed "..n) end
elseif verb == "at" then local n, pat = rest:match("^(%S+)%s+(.+)$") local m = n and find(n) if not m then ColourNote("orange","","Usage: recallmanager at <name> <regexp|off>") elseif pat == "off" then m.at = nil; drop_trigger(n) ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: "..n.." arrival cleared") else m.at = pat; make_trigger(m) ColourNote("cyan","","Recall Manager: "..n.." arrival = "..pat) end
else local m = find(verb) if m then fire(m) else ColourNote("orange","","Recall Manager: no button '"..verb.."'. Try 'recallmanager list' or 'recallmanager help'.") end end end
---------------------------------------------------------------------- -- lifecycle ---------------------------------------------------------------------- function OnPluginInstall () cfg = defaults() local blob = GetVariable("cfg") if blob then local ok = pcall(function() assert(loadstring(blob))() end) if ok and saved then for k, v in pairs(saved) do cfg[k] = v end cfg.methods = cfg.methods or {} end end
windowinfo = movewindow.install(win, miniwin.pos_top_right, miniwin.create_absolute_location, false, nil, { mouseup = rm_titlebar }, { x = 10, y = 120 }) WindowCreate(win, windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top, MINW, 30, windowinfo.window_mode, windowinfo.window_flags, COL.bg) WindowFont(win, "f", cfg.font, cfg.size, false, false, false, false, 0) WindowFont(win, "fb", cfg.font, cfg.size, true, false, false, false, 0)
for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do make_trigger(m) end rebuild() WindowShow(win, true) end
function rm_titlebar (flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then local r = WindowMenu(win, WindowInfo(win,14), WindowInfo(win,15), "Hide|Reset counters") if r == "Hide" then WindowShow(win, false) elseif r == "Reset counters" then for _, m in ipairs(cfg.methods) do m.count = 0 end cfg.last = "-"; paint() end end end
function OnPluginSaveState () SetVariable("cfg", "saved = "..serialize.save_simple(cfg)) if WindowInfo(win, 1) then movewindow.save_state(win) end end
function OnPluginClose () WindowShow(win, false) WindowDelete(win) end
